ogTitle: Yarrie Lake vs Yarrowford: Climate Safety

heading: Yarrie Lake vs Yarrowford — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yarrie Lake, New South Wales and Yarrowford, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yarrie Lake has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Yarrowford (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yarrie Lake or Yarrowford safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yarrie Lake has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Yarrowford scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yarrie Lake scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Yarrowford scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yarrie Lake or Yarrowford?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yarrie Lake has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
